content.text:
Based on my examination of the molecule, I can clearly see the neighbour atoms of atom C:35. From both the zoomed-in view and the rotated view, I can confirm the following:

## Neighbour Atoms of C:35

Atom C:35 is covalently connected to **3 neighbour atoms**:

| Atomic Index | Element |
|--------------|---------|
| 34 | C (Carbon) |
| 36 | C (Carbon) |
| 39 | C (Carbon) |

## Geomconf Index
**geomconf_index: 6953**

The atom C:35 is part of a benzene ring structure and forms covalent bonds with three carbon atoms (C:34, C:36, and C:39). C:34 and C:36 are adjacent atoms within the same aromatic ring, while C:39 connects to another ring system in the molecule.

question: Please find the neighbour atoms of the atom with atomic index 35, whose element should be C. Here, neighbour atoms are defined as atoms that are covalently connected to this atom. Report all neighbour atoms by listing their atomic index (as shown in the image) and their element. Also return the geomconf_index for this molecule.
